text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This year's summer camp is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara, contrary to her past self, is set on
training hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her new resolve, my own motivation is
running high too!
